News

A very successful first board meeting of Pride in Place!

Friday, 24 April, 2026
Thrilled to attend a very successful and long anticipated first board meeting of Pride in Place for West Lindsey. Building on the levelling up money I got from Michael Gove. We're aiming to continue the good work made to the centre of town, like the new improvements to the market square, which look great. I hope a lot of good regeneration is going to happen and I'm feeling very confident about...
